infraBlockers: EDS_TOKEN not provided — da.live uploads pending; all preview URLs return 404
GitHub App (AEM Code Sync) has 0 repos configured — CDN returns 'Missing configuration'; owner must add eds-migration to app's repository access list

checks.name: Code Quality — ESLint
checks.details: npx eslint blocks/ scripts/ exits 0 with zero errors or warnings. All 19 block directories (accordion, breadcrumbs, cards, carousel, columns, content-filter, embed, fragment, hero, hubspot-form, icon-grid, modal, profile, quote, search, stats, table, tabs, video) have .js and .css files present. airbnb-base rule set enforced.
checks.evidence: ESLint exit code 0 on main branch commit 51ddfe7

checks.name: Block Inventory
checks.details: 19 blocks present in blocks/ directory. Blueprint specifies 18 blocks — icon-grid was listed as 'eliminated' in blueprint (should be cards (icon) variant), yet a standalone icon-grid block was scaffolded. No runtime impact; icon-grid block works, but introduces palette redundancy vs the blueprint decision. Recommend deprecating icon-grid in favour of cards (icon) variant per blueprint.
checks.evidence: git ls-tree main:blocks/ shows 19 entries; blueprint.json summary.totalBlocks=18; blueprint.eliminatedBlocks includes icon-grid

checks.name: helix-query.yaml validity
checks.details: Valid YAML. version=1, 4 indices: site (/**), events (/events/**), news (/news/**), knowledge (/knowledge/**). All indices declare title, description, image, lastModified. Domain-specific fields: eventDate/eventLocation/eventType for events; publishDate/division/category for news; contentType/topic/expert for knowledge.
checks.evidence: GitHub raw fetch + yaml.safe_load: PASS (phase4 config verifier)

checks.name: helix-sitemap.yaml validity
checks.details: Valid YAML. version=1, 4 sitemaps: default (/sitemap.xml with correct exclusions for /client-login/, /careers/resources/, /category/, /drafts/, /fragments/, /nav, /footer), events (/sitemap-events.xml), news (/sitemap-news.xml), knowledge (/sitemap-knowledge.xml). hreflang en correctly maps to almacgroup.com{path}.
checks.evidence: GitHub raw fetch + yaml.safe_load: PASS (phase4 config verifier)

checks.name: robots.txt validity
checks.details: robots.txt present on main, well-formed. Disallows: /client-login/, /careers/resources/, /category/, /drafts/, /fragments/, /?s=. References all 4 sitemap URLs using the aem.live CDN domain.
checks.evidence: GitHub raw fetch: HTTP 200 (phase4 config verifier)

checks.name: fstab.yaml mount point
checks.details: fstab.yaml mountpoints./ = 'https://content.da.live/manuel-vara/eds-migration'. Correct DA.live content source. Not overwritten by any config phase.
checks.evidence: GitHub raw fetch: PASS (phase4 config verifier)

checks.name: Redirects HTML completeness
checks.details: redirects.html contains 57 redirect rows (1 header + 56 data rows parsed; 57 total including header). Covers: 4 known 301 redirects from status files (/biotech, /pharma-services with trailing-slash variants), 37 careers-resource → /careers stubs, 1 client-portal → /client-login, 1 blog-category → /news, 4 WP alias normalisations (/about-us→/about, /our-locations→/about, ?page_id=2251→/diagnostics, /almac_journies/*→/careers/stories/*), /pharmaceutical-development → /pharmaceutical-drug-product-development (both variants). No redirect loops or chains detected.

checks.name: Bulk Metadata coverage
checks.details: metadata.html contains 3,607 rows (deduplicated by EDS path). Manifest has 3,615 pages. Difference of 8 is accounted for by: duplicate URLs in manifest (same page in multiple archetypes), redirect-only pages (biotech/, pharma-services/), and client-portal pages excluded from metadata per sitemap exclusion rules. All 27 archetypes have template assignments.
checks.evidence: HTMLParser row count on .eds-migration/state/config/metadata.html; manifest.json page count 3,615

checks.name: Navigation link coverage
checks.details: nav.html contains 296 links (285 unique paths). Source header had 271 unique almacgroup.com paths. Coverage: 99.6% (270/271 matched). One missing path is a PDF asset (/commercial-services/wp-content/uploads/...Brochure.pdf) — correctly excluded from EDS nav. 17 top-level nav links present with logo.
checks.evidence: HTMLParser link extraction vs source-bundle/chrome/header.links.json (phase5 config verifier)

checks.name: Footer link coverage
checks.details: footer.html contains 20 links covering 100% of source footer link texts (16/16). All source footer links matched: Careers, About Us, Our Locations, Latest News, Knowledge Centre, Almac Discovery, Almac Diagnostic Services, Privacy Policy, Galen Pharmaceuticals, phone numbers (+44/+1/+65), Company Information, Terms and Conditions, Privacy & Cookie Policy, Modern Slavery Statement. Additional social links (LinkedIn/YouTube/Vimeo) present beyond source capture.
checks.evidence: HTMLParser link extraction vs source-bundle/chrome/footer.links.json (phase5 config verifier)

checks.name: Pilot HTML — EDS block table format
checks.details: All 16 pilot pages use valid EDS table syntax with named block <th> headers and <hr> section dividers. Metadata table present on all 16 pages. Three case inconsistencies detected across pilot pages: (1) 'Cards (Related)' vs 'Cards (related)' — mixed capitalisation; (2) 'HubSpot Form (Gated-Content)' vs 'HubSpot Form (gated-content)' vs 'Hubspot Form (gated-content)' — three variants of same block name; (3) 'Profile (Expert)' vs 'Profile (expert)'. EDS block name resolution is case-insensitive for the base name but variant classes use exact casing — normalise to lowercase variants. Also: 'Product Specifications' block used in api-chemical-product.html is not in the standard 18-block palette (may be intended as a Table variant).
checks.evidence: HTMLParser block name extraction across all content-staging/**/*.html

checks.name: Pilot HTML — Internal link quality
checks.details: 436 internal links found across 16 pilot pages. 3 broken WordPress post-ID links found in diagnostics.html: https://www.almacgroup.com/?p=92072, ?p=92127, ?p=92129 (upcoming events). These are legacy WordPress post-ID permalinks that will produce 404s or redirect to wrong pages in EDS. Resolve to canonical pretty-print URLs before final import.
checks.evidence: HTMLParser href scan on all content-staging/**/*.html

checks.name: Accessibility — heading hierarchy + alt text
checks.details: Alt text: PASS — all 16 pilot pages have alt attributes on all img elements (no missing alt). Heading hierarchy issues found: (1) diagnostics.html has 9 H1 elements — the service sections each use H1 instead of H2/H3; (2) careers.html has 2 H1 elements — duplicate H1; (3) knowledge/experts/abi-pesun.html has no H1 — expert name is in H2; (4) knowledge/experts/doctor-rodney-brown.html has no H1. WCAG 2.1 AA requires single H1 per page and no heading level skips. 12/16 pages have correct single H1.
checks.evidence: HTMLParser heading tag scan on all content-staging/**/*.html

checks.name: Lighthouse performance
checks.details: DEFERRED — Cannot run. Preview URLs (https://main--eds-migration--manuel-vara.aem.page/) return 404 because: (a) da.live content has not been uploaded (no EDS_TOKEN), (b) GitHub App AEM Code Sync has 0 repos configured so CDN cannot serve content. Target: 100/100/100/100 on Performance/Accessibility/Best Practices/SEO. Re-run after activation prerequisites are met.
checks.remediation: Complete activation checklist: (1) owner adds eds-migration to AEM Code Sync GitHub App repo access, (2) obtain EDS_TOKEN and upload content-staging/ to da.live, (3) run Lighthouse against live preview URL

checks.name: Visual regression — desktop + mobile
checks.details: DEFERRED — Cannot run. Source-of-truth screenshots exist in source-bundle/pages/<slug>/desktop.png and mobile.png (32 pages). Preview URLs return 404. Per-archetype visual comparison requires live preview. Expected similarity threshold: >=0.75 pHash. Re-run after activation.
checks.remediation: After da.live upload and CDN activation, run Playwright visual diff against source-bundle screenshots for all 32 source-bundle pages

checks.name: Nav/footer chrome visual check
checks.details: DEFERRED — Cannot run. Source truth: source-bundle/chrome/header-desktop.png and footer-desktop.png. Preview returns 404. Config verifier confirmed nav/footer documents NOT on da.live (admin API returns 404 for /nav and /footer). Once uploaded, render homepage and screenshot header/footer bands at 1440px desktop width and compare against source chrome.
checks.remediation: Upload config/nav.html and config/footer.html to da.live via POST /source/manuel-vara/eds-migration/nav (Authorization: Bearer $EDS_TOKEN, Content-Type: text/html). Then POST to admin.hlx.page/preview/.../main/nav and .../footer. Capture Playwright screenshot and compare.

checks.name: Redirect 301 verification (live CDN)
checks.details: DEFERRED — All 18 unique status file URLs have published=false. Per protocol: skip redirect checks for pages where published is false. Zero pages have been published to the CDN (https://main--eds-migration--manuel-vara.aem.live). Tag: redirect-not-verified: not-published for all 18 pages.
checks.remediation: After uploading redirects.html to da.live and publishing, verify 301 responses from CDN for all /biotech, /pharma-services, /careers/resources/*, /category/*, /about-us, /almac_journies/* source URLs

Full migration of 3,591 non-pilot pages pending.

regressions.details: 3 block name casing inconsistencies across pilot HTML files: 'Cards (Related)' vs 'Cards (related)', 'HubSpot Form (Gated-Content)' vs 'HubSpot Form (gated-content)' vs 'Hubspot Form (gated-content)', 'Profile (Expert)' vs 'Profile (expert)'. EDS normalizes block names to lowercase+dashes internally, so runtime behaviour is unaffected, but authoring consistency should be maintained.
regressions.remediation: Standardize all block variant names to lowercase in pilot HTML: 'Cards (related)', 'HubSpot Form (gated-content)', 'Profile (expert)'. Update phase4 migration rules.

regressions.details: 4 pilot pages have heading hierarchy violations: diagnostics.html (9×H1), careers.html (2×H1), knowledge/experts/abi-pesun.html (0×H1), knowledge/experts/doctor-rodney-brown.html (0×H1). WCAG 2.1 AA requires single H1 per page.
regressions.remediation: Fix diagnostics.html: demote service-section H1s to H2. Fix careers.html: demote second H1 to H2. Fix expert profile pages: promote expert name from H2 to H1 in Profile (Expert) block template.

regressions.details: 3 WordPress post-ID links (?p=92072, ?p=92127, ?p=92129) in diagnostics.html will produce broken links in EDS.
regressions.remediation: Resolve ?p= post IDs to canonical event URLs. These are upcoming events — check almacgroup.com for the current canonical URLs for those three events.

regressions.details: 'Product Specifications' block used in api-chemical/products/aldehyde-reductases.html is not in the standard 18-block palette. May be a 'Table' block with a custom name, or an undocumented variant.
regressions.remediation: Rename to 'Table' block (standard EDS table block) or add 'product-specifications' to the block palette and create blocks/product-specifications/ with JS+CSS files.
